name: Kevin Bridges
blurb: He broke through in 2009 on Michael McIntyres Comedy Roadshow and quickly became one of the UKs biggest live draws, selling out record runs at Glasgows Hydro arena.
bio: Kevin Bridges is a Scottish stand-up comedian from Clydebank known for observational comedy rooted in Glaswegian working-class life. He broke through in 2009 on Michael McIntyres Comedy Roadshow and quickly became one of the UKs biggest live draws, selling out record runs at Glasgows Hydro arena. He is a frequent guest on British panel shows including Would I Lie to You.

timeline.ev: Performs his first stand-up gig at The Stand in Glasgow
National breakthrough on Michael McIntyres Comedy Roadshow
BBC One series Kevin Bridges What's the Story begins
Returns with The Brand New Tour, a record 19 sold-out Hydro nights
Publishes his memoir We Need to Talk About Kevin Bridges

accolades: First comedian to top the Ticketmaster UK Ticket of the Year poll
Record-breaking run of sold-out shows at Glasgows Hydro arena
Best-selling author of the memoir We Need to Talk About Kevin Bridges
